/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/hello-simulator.dir/hello-simulator.cc.o" -o /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/examples/tutorial/ns3.37-hello-simulator-default  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/python@3.13/Frameworks -Wl,-rpath,/Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-core-default.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/gsl/2.8/lib/libgsl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/gsl/2.8/lib/libgslcblas.dylib
